sourceMovie.title: Theri
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Theri (2016) stuck because it commits to its action premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Atlee's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The action and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Hackers
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Theri clicked for you, Hackers (1995) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and crime, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Theri clicked for you, Battle Royale (2000) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Theri?
faq.answer: Try Hackers, Battle Royale, Star Trek: First Contact—each shares DNA with Theri while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Theri?
faq.answer: Theri (2016) is best described as Action, Crime, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Theri worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.7/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
